name: Lemon Tea Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to desired temperature and grease a 9-inch round baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, sift together flour and baking powder. Stir in lemon peel and set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, butter, eggs, and margarine. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat until combined. Increase speed to high and beat until the mixture is light and fluffy and doubled in volume.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture alternately with milk, beating at low speed until the batter is smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 50 to 55 minutes (until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean).
6. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
7. Garnish with lemon slices and cut into 12 equal pieces.
Each serving provides: 1 Bread exchange; 1 fat Exchange; 110 Optional Calories. Per Serving: 220 calories; 4g protein; 9g fat; 31g carbohydrate; 56 mg calcium; 170 mg sodium; 57mg cholesterol; 0.8g dietary fiber.
